query: SELECT id, subject, code, title, status, last_covered_source, last_covered_at FROM curriculumTopics WHERE subject IN ('Math','ELA','Science') AND (LOWER(title) LIKE '%fraction%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%division%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%multipl%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%expanded%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%order%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%angle%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%quadrilat%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%hierarchy%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%pattern%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%poetry%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%haiku%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%simile%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%metaphor%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%essay%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%noun%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%verb%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%adject%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%atom%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%crystal%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%compass%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%solar%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%planet%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%expan%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%gas%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%matter%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%problem solv%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%story problem%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%word problem%') ORDER BY subject, ord LIMIT 80;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, subject, code, title, status, last_covered_source, last_covered_at FROM curriculumTopics WHERE subject IN ('Math','ELA','Science') AND (LOWER(title) LIKE '%fraction%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%division%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%multipl%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%expanded%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%order%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%angle%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%quadrilat%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%hierarchy%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%pattern%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%poetry%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%haiku%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%simile%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%metaphor%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%essay%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%noun%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%verb%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%adject%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%atom%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%crystal%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%compass%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%solar%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%planet%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%expan%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%gas%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%matter%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%problem solv%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%story problem%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%word problem%') ORDER BY subject, ord LIMIT 80;
